title: senecio × reisachii
intro: Senecio × reisachii, also known as Reisach's ragwort, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting skin health. Senecio × reisachii can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
